name: Country Gravy
recipeIngredient: 1 vegetable bouillon cube, no salt added
2 teaspoons miso (use a light, sweet variety)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, sauté the onion and garlic in some of the water until soft.
2. Add the vegetable bouillon cube, flour, nutritional yeast, miso, salt, and pepper to the skillet.
3. Gradually add water, stirring constantly, until all ingredients are incorporated and the mixture is smooth and bubbly.
4. Adjust seasoning as desired.
5. Serve immediately. If the gravy is too thick, thin it out with additional water before adding more seasonings like salt or nutritional yeast.
